title: limonium costae
intro: Limonium costae is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae, commonly known as a sea lavender or a coastal shrub. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been shown to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of Limonium costae include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
